page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz with a 33 MB L3 cache. The system is configured with 256 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. A key feature of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of 7679 GB of SSD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a 10 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core operations. Single-core CPU performance is weak, placing in the bottom 25% on stress-ng and Geekbench tests, with single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance is more robust, achieving average ratings across stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark CPU tests, and a strong top-25% rating in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth and database operations, including Redis SET and static web serving, consistently perform in the middle 50% tier.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i2g.16xlarge offers high resource density, combining a large 7.6 TB local SSD storage volume with 64 dedicated cores. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require significant local storage capacity alongside moderate multi-threaded compute capabilities. Appropriate workloads include database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications that can leverage the large local SSD storage without requiring high single-core CPU speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.16xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz, 256 GB of RAM, and a bundled 7679 GB local SSD. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU execution is weak, ranking in the bottom 25%, whereas multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth consistently reach average tiers, with multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scoring in the top 25%. Given its high local storage capacity and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy, multi-threaded workloads. It is best suited for database hosting, static web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require substantial local storage but do not depend on high single-core processing speeds.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.16xlarge is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 7.6 TB of local SSD storage, delivering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB local SSD storage for database and multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: An x86 server combining sixty-four dedicated cores with over seven terabytes of local SSD storage for data-intensive multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz
256 GB RAM paired with 7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Average multi-core performance contrasted with weak single-core benchmarks
Suited for database hosting, static web serving, and multi-threaded processing
